actions.expression:
SELECT chyjhsheet.sid,
       chyjh.wxfp,
       chyjh.chyrq,
       chyjh.order_id,
       chyjhsheet.kpgc,
       chyjhsheet.gcdh,
       chyjhsheet.hyd,
       chyjhsheet.zhwbgpm,
       chyjhsheet.bgjldw,
       chyjhsheet.qtcz,
       chyjhsheet.zzsl,
       chyjhsheet.tsl,
       chyjhsheet.ywrya,
       chyjhsheet.ywry,
       chyjhsheet.gdry
FROM chyjh,chyjhsheet 
WHERE (chyjh.sid=chyjhsheet.pid) 
  
ORDER BY chyjhsheet.sid ASC

actions.name: 未命名事件
actions.caption: 未命名事件
actions.expression:
SELECT chyjh.sid,chyjh.chyrq 
FROM chyjh 
WHERE (chyjh.wxfp=:wxfp) 
ORDER BY chyjh.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 未命名事件696
actions.caption: 未命名事件696
actions.expression:
SELECT ywrybiao.sid,ywrybiao.bm 
FROM ywrybiao 
WHERE (ywrybiao.yhm=:yhm) 
ORDER BY ywrybiao.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT chyjhsheet.sid,
       chyjhsheet.zhwbgpm,
       chyjhsheet.bgjldw,
       chyjhsheet.qtcz,
       chyjhsheet.zzsl,
       chyjhsheet.tsl,
       chyjhsheet.ywrya,
       chyjhsheet.ywry,
       chyjhsheet.gdry,
       chyjhsheet.hyd
FROM chyjh,chyjhsheet 
WHERE (chyjh.sid=chyjhsheet.pid) 
  AND (chyjh.wxfp=:wxfp) 
  AND (chyjhsheet.sccj1=:sccj1) 
ORDER BY chyjhsheet.sid ASC

FROM ywrybiao

ORDER BY ywrybiao.sid DESC LIMIT 1

view.params:
SELECT wfgs.wfgs,wfgs.SID
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

SELECT chyjhsheet.kpgc
FROM chyjh,chyjhsheet
WHERE   ((chyjh.rid=chyjhsheet.PID)
   AND  (chyjh.fphm=[预填费用.发票号码])
   and (chyjhsheet.zzsl>0)) group by chyjhsheet.kpgc

SELECT zx.cs
FROM zx
WHERE   (zx.ly="增值税率")

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.zw like "%单证%")

SELECT cyzglsheet.xm,cyzglsheet.SID
FROM cyzglsheet
WHERE   (cyzglsheet.zm="预填审批")
ORDER BY cyzglsheet.SID ASC

通过
不通过
待审批

SELECT chyjhsheet.cght,chyjhsheet.SID
FROM chyjh,chyjhsheet
WHERE   (chyjh.rid=chyjhsheet.PID)
   AND  (chyjh.wxfp=:wxfp)
   AND  (chyjhsheet.sccj1 like "%"+ :sccj1  +"%") and (chyjhsheet.zzsl>0)
ORDER BY chyjhsheet.SID ASC
